MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Jeffrey McCormick.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Steven Duclerque is present.
Attorney Jennifer Gould representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of July-16-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
